chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4098 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.17208/2020. 2. For hearing of CMA No.17209/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 14.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Moiz Jaferii, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shahnawaz M. Sahito, advocate for the respondents 2 & 3. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Present petition seeks implementation of order of the Appellate Tribunal dated 25.06.2019, prima facie, direct recourse to the writ jurisdiction cannot be sought in this regard. In view of the judgment dated 09.08.2024, of the Supreme Court in the case of Khalid alias Muhammad Khalid and others vs. Collector of Customs (Adjudication), Customs House Lahore etc. (Civil Petition No.3391 of 2024) petition is not maintainable and found to be mis-conceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
